programme.title: E3 - The Next Generation
programme.desc: Channel your inner sci-fi fan and explore the bizarre mating rituals of the ocean’s most peculiar creatures. Learn how bloody battles for mates, gender bending and supersize litters of babies just might secure a next generation for these animals.

programme.title: E1 - Insect Apocalypse
programme.desc: Look at what a global insect decline could do to our planet. Uncover our historical dependence on these tiny animals, the vital roles they play in our ecosystems, and the reasons why our fragile relationship to them is in danger worldwide.

programme.title: E2 - Life Givers
programme.desc: Learn how bees, butterflies, moths, and other pollinators keep our fields and forests fruitful, and weigh what life would be like if these busy bugs vanished. Witness a mysterious butterfly pilgrimage and a moth’s clever way of escaping hungry bats.

programme.title: E4 - Beast Buddies
programme.desc: Meet more Amazing Animal Friends, an animal shelter puppy that helps a captive cheetah cub get ready for the wild, and an injured monkey who wins over a pack of unfriendly dogs and a lonely mongoose that enjoys foraging with a flock of sheep.

programme.title: The Ocean's Greatest Feast
programme.desc: Get a front-row seat to the planet’s biggest biomass migration, the annual 1,000-mile sardine run along South Africa’s east coast. See billions of these tiny fish run a gauntlet of hungry predators, including stealthy seals and dive-bombing gannets.

programme.title: E5 - Jungle Juniors
programme.desc: Every year, more than 200,000 monkeys in Peru are trafficked illegally. Almost all are babies. Watch as these little ones learn to survive without their moms and try to make new friends along the way.

programme.title: E1 - Insect Apocalypse
programme.desc: Look at what a global insect decline could do to our planet. Uncover our historical dependence on these tiny animals, the vital roles they play in our ecosystems, and the reasons why our fragile relationship to them is in danger worldwide.

programme.title: E2 - Life Givers
programme.desc: Learn how bees, butterflies, moths, and other pollinators keep our fields and forests fruitful, and weigh what life would be like if these busy bugs vanished. Witness a mysterious butterfly pilgrimage and a moth’s clever way of escaping hungry bats.

programme.title: E4 - Beast Buddies
programme.desc: Meet more Amazing Animal Friends, an animal shelter puppy that helps a captive cheetah cub get ready for the wild, and an injured monkey who wins over a pack of unfriendly dogs and a lonely mongoose that enjoys foraging with a flock of sheep.

programme.title: E2 - An Island Home
programme.desc: Face a tough decision when Esti’s leg infection puts the brakes on this young duiker’s release. Then track and collar a young lion with Dr. Amanda; check on an ailing bush baby; and greet the noisy new addition to the center, a grumpy grey parrot.

programme.title: E3 - The Next Generation
programme.desc: Channel your inner sci-fi fan and explore the bizarre mating rituals of the ocean’s most peculiar creatures. Learn how bloody battles for mates, gender bending and supersize litters of babies just might secure a next generation for these animals.

programme.title: E1 - Insect Apocalypse

programme.title: E2 - Life Givers
programme.desc: Learn how bees, butterflies, moths, and other pollinators keep our fields and forests fruitful, and weigh what life would be like if these busy bugs vanished. Witness a mysterious butterfly pilgrimage and a moth’s clever way of escaping hungry bats.

programme.title: E2 - Winged Weirdos
programme.desc: One uses a mustache to attract mates and another has a bill so big, it needs special vertebrae to carry it. Learn how nature's flying iconoclasts have evolved their appearance in order to survive.

programme.title: E1 - Monkey Garden
programme.desc: Explore the southern edge of the Pantanal, where brown capuchin monkeys live in their own Garden of Eden. Dry season in the highlands treats them well until a drought dries up their food sources. Can an industrious agouti save them from starvation?

programme.title: E3 - Peccary Party
programme.desc: Trek through the forests and savannahs of the Pantanal’s Nhecolândia region, which is home to noisy herds of peccaries. Follow these pig-like mammals on their daily food-foraging routes, and run into roseate spoonbills and capybaras along the way.

programme.title: E4 - Jaguar Den
programme.desc: In the heart of Brazil, the largest cat in the Americas, the magnificent jaguar, reigns over a magical land filled with natural beauty and diversity.

programme.title: E3 - The Young Ones
programme.desc: In this episode of Amazing Animal Friends a rescued orphaned rhino befriended by a playful dog and doting sheep, a big bunny rabbit that babysits boisterous baby lambs, and a porcupine that helps two English bulldogs rehabilitate injured animals.

programme.title: E4 - Beast Buddies
programme.desc: Meet more Amazing Animal Friends, an animal shelter puppy that helps a captive cheetah cub get ready for the wild, and an injured monkey who wins over a pack of unfriendly dogs and a lonely mongoose that enjoys foraging with a flock of sheep.

programme.title: E5 - Einstein Rules
programme.desc: Come full circle as the dry season descends and the Waterfront Pride enjoys good hunting and renewed confidence in their territory. Then celebrate the success of former outsider Einstein, who gets down to business as the king of his very own pride.

Find out what's going on in the world of economy, politics, culture, sport, medicine, ecology. Focus has it all covered for you. Short videos contain facts, interviews with real people, numbers, statistics, everything you need to be aware of recent events in the world and of what is actually going on.

programme.title: Pollution Solution
programme.desc: When an oil spill happens out at sea, the kids come up with a plan to save the sea animals of Kiwifruit Valley.

programme.title: Mighty Muscles!
programme.desc: One of Britain's strongest women, Andrea Thompson, joins the Doctors in the lab as they reveal how muscle fibers work, and we welcome three more incredible Ouch! Award finalists.

programme.title: Game On
programme.desc: Sometimes Gabi takes winning way too seriously. Doki wonders - does Gabi really have to win, to have fun? To find out, they set off to the ‘One of a Kind Game Kingdom' at the Silly Sports Park in Japan, where the games are as goofy as they are unique.

programme.title: Kevin Bergquist: Martial Arts Champ
programme.desc: Karate champion and GUINNESS WORLD RECORDS holder Kevin Bergquist meets with Will Munford and shares the fundamentals of staying positive and focused. Kevin also teaches Will about confidence and how to use that to his advantage.

programme.title: Mighty Muscles!
programme.desc: One of Britain's strongest women, Andrea Thompson, joins the Doctors in the lab as they reveal how muscle fibers work, and we welcome three more incredible Ouch! Award finalists.

programme.title: Tartaruga
programme.desc: The Nektons explore a floating island and find the pieces of the ancient Lemurian navigation device. But why is this island moving?

programme.title: It's So Dice
programme.desc: In this episode Eric presents an amazing dice trick: Just by looking at a tower of any number of dice, he can accurately calculate the sum of the hidden faces. How does he do it? And, is it magic ... or is it math?!

programme.title: The Bare Bird Bath
programme.desc: Kea's bird bath keeps running out of water, and after investigating the problem, Darwin and Newts discover that it's evaporating in the sun.

programme.title: Taking on the World
programme.desc: Josh is in Hungary, representing Great Britain in his first-ever World Championships. Back home, Jellie has a big decision to make, and Kloe is disappointed not to be in Hungary.

programme.title: Desert Coast
programme.desc: Four young adventurers explore Namaqua National Park in South Africa, a desert region with the largest concentration of succulent plants in the world. They learn how to survive in its harsh environment by learning ancient traditions.

programme.title: Federica the Turtle
programme.desc: Federica, the turtle, has arrived from Italy after a run-in with a container ship. Loro Parque has offered to be her ‘forever home', but how will she go sharing her new digs with others? Esmeralda, the iguana, has a lumpy belly and Jorge, the vet, is worried.

programme.title: Pollution Solution
programme.desc: When an oil spill happens out at sea, the kids come up with a plan to save the sea animals of Kiwifruit Valley.

programme.title: Jesters
programme.desc: Lord Roach is feeling really down! His wife Geraldine goes out of her way to entertain him, bringing in acrobats, musicians, etc. But it's no good. Enter Little Lewis, dressed in his court jester costume and Lord Roach is very happy.

programme.title: The Recycling Bandit
programme.desc: Addison and her friends are distracted from their mission of making cool costumes for Ayrton Park's version of Comicon when someone or something starts messing with recycling bins all over the neighbourhood.

programme.title: Dragon
programme.desc: While playing knights, the three friends start arguing because no one wants to be the baddie. They convince Ranger Loops to be the baddie, and the three knights embark on a mission to free Dragon-Yoko from the slide tower where he is being held captive.

programme.title: Mysterious White Coral
programme.desc: The lab of Australian scientists inspecting the cause of the devastating coral reef bleaching epidemic has suffered a series of late-night robberies. And this is seriously interfering with their research.

programme.title: Mayday Dugong!
programme.desc: A biologist has reported that many of Thailand's highly endangered dugongs are sick and haven't eaten for days. The fear is that something has tainted their natural food supply! The MeteoHeroes are going on a mission to save the poor dugongs.

programme.title: Hogie Goes to Bali
programme.desc: Hogie and his pals run into trouble in Bali when an accident leaves them without a kite before the kite flying competition on the beach. Their new friend Made offers to help, and the friends set out to build their very own flying kite.

programme.title: Search for the Big Seven Part 3: Whale of a Time
programme.desc: A group of young explorers head for the sea on their search for the biggest of the Big Seven wild animals in South Africa – the whale. On the way they meet giant snails, noisy frogs and dolphins. They are about to give up their search when they spot two playful whales.

programme.title: Tunnel
programme.desc: An undersea waterfall hides a mysterious tunnel behind it. As the Nektons explore it, they find not everything is as it should be.

programme.title: Flying Pig
programme.desc: My oh my... it's a pig in the sky! We'll show you how to make this little piggy go “weeeeeeee!”

programme.title: The Survivor (Bear Grylls) and The Boss (Ursula Burns)
programme.desc: In this episode of Becoming Xtraordinary, Bear Grylls shares his story of perseverance and how he became 'the world's best known survival expert', while Ursula Burns reflects on her journey to becoming the first Black woman CEO of a Fortune 500 company.

programme.title: Admirable Admiral
programme.desc: Eric learns that even if something is made from a material that is denser or heavier than water, it will float if it has the right shape. He makes a paper boat strong enough to carry toy cars without sinking.

programme.title: Flying Pig
programme.desc: My oh my... it's a pig in the sky! We'll show you how to make this little piggy go “weeeeeeee!”

programme.title: Flying Pig

programme.title: Federica the Turtle
programme.desc: Federica, the turtle, has arrived from Italy after a run-in with a container ship. Loro Parque has offered to be her ‘forever home', but how will she go sharing her new digs with others? Esmeralda, the iguana, has a lumpy belly and Jorge, the vet, is worried.

programme.title: E2 - When Everything Goes Hilariously Wrong!
programme.desc: Get ready to laugh as everything goes hilariously wrong for Kii & Yii & their friends! The chaos starts when Robot creates a jelly-making machine, but it goes haywire & he ends up stuck inside a giant wobbly jelly! Then, Princess Cat puts way too much soap in her washing machine, causing it to overflow & fill her entire castle with bubbles! From a wobbly tooth to a picky eater, it's one funny problem after another!

programme.title: E1 - Twinkle's Most Magical Moments!
programme.desc: Join Twinkle the star for her most magical moments! When Max, Muffin & Bao Bao build a toy train, Twinkle transforms into a real train & takes the kids on a ride all around the house! Then, when Max pretends he's a wizard, Twinkle turns into a magic wand to make his magic real! Her powers continue as she brings fruits & veggies to life for a puppet show & turns into a giant wibbly-wobbly jelly for everyone to play on! It's always magical with Twinkle!

programme.title: E1 - A Super Fun Day with Cody!
programme.desc: Spend a super fun day with Cody from morning to night! Join Toni & Cody as they bond during a special Hair Wash Day, where they scrub, rinse & comb his perfect curls. Then, Cody dresses up in a safari outfit & leads his Dad on a quest through a jungle-like environment to find dinosaurs! The fun day ends with a silly bedtime routine where his parents make deliberate mistakes, prompting laughs from Cody as he 'corrects' them.

programme.title: E4 - Fun Facts About The World!
programme.desc: Blippi is learning fun facts all about the world! He & D.BO shrink down to meet Ernie the Eraser, an aspiring magician who teaches them the science behind how erasers work. Then, they fly into the night sky to learn how fireworks get their colors & why some animals, like raccoons, prefer to come out at night. The adventure continues as Blippi learns how to be a cowboy in the desert & helps a brave spoon protect his cereal from getting soggy!

programme.title: E3 - What Will Cody Do Today?
programme.desc: What will Cody do today? Every day is a new adventure! He might move to a new house with his family & cat, Pickles. Or maybe he'll find a simple empty cardboard box & use his imagination to turn it into a turtle shell, a drum & a race car! He could go on a hike with JJ & race walnut sailboats, or stay home & sing the ABCs over a big pot of alphabet soup. With Cody, you never know what fun you'll have!

programme.title: E1 - Taking on the Baddest Baddies in Town!
programme.desc: It's up to Mila & Morphle to take on the baddest baddies in town! The trouble begins when the Bandits use robot versions of Mila & Morphle to cause chaos. Then, the friends discover a Mirror World where they meet Orphle, Morphle's naughty reflection. When Orphle escapes & causes trouble, they have to stop him! The action continues as the Bandits use a zapper to turn animals into giants & team up with Orphle to escape from jail!

programme.title: E1 - When Baby Daniel Causes Total Mayhem!
programme.desc: Get ready for some total mayhem caused by Baby Daniel! The chaos begins when Daniel finds the remote to control Arpo, turning the robot babysitter into everything from an elephant to a bird! Then, Arpo is tasked with cleaning the kitchen, but Daniel just wants to play, making an even bigger mess. From getting covered in mud to being extra noisy while Daddy is trying to sleep, Baby Daniel keeps Arpo on his toes in this fun-filled, chaotic adventure!

programme.title: E8 - JJ's Nature Walk & Favorite Rhymes!
programme.desc: Join JJ for a nature walk & some of his favorite rhymes! First, JJ's family shows him all the fun things we can do to help the Earth, like sorting trash for recycling. Then, the kids go on a nature walk with Bingo, collecting fun information in their scrapbooks! After the outdoor fun, it's time for classic rhymes. Sing along as ten animal friends try to share a bed & help the three little kittens who have lost their mittens!

programme.title: E1 - Underwater Problems & Clever Fixes
programme.desc: The Sharksons are using their brains for some clever underwater fixes! When all the contents of Tucker's bag fall out from a hole in his backpack, Stanley & Grub help him fix it so he can get to school. Then, when Grub can't get to sleep because she's afraid of the dark, Stanley has a clever idea to make a 'star' night light from a glove that floated down. From turning veggies into a fun game to sorting recycling, there's always a clever fix!

programme.desc: Halmoni falls in love with a customer's dog. Rather than return him, she dog-naps him and goes on the lam! // Jack volunteers to run the Groom & Board solo, but when a pet snake causes chaos he must protect the other pets from the jaws of death!

programme.title: E104 - Houbi Houba Heist / Twister's Treehouse
programme.desc: Mica's Marsup journal ends up in Acu's bag so he has to get it back before his friend finds it. // Twister, is fed up of Hope and Punch's pranks, so he builds his own cardboard house which Stan finds.

programme.title: E404 - Face the Music with the Casagrandes
programme.desc: When Ronnie Anne discovers that each family member will perform for Hector's birthday, she turns to Sid for help.

programme.title: E101 - Jade the Juggler / Parcel Chase
programme.desc: Jade tries to help too many people and ends up causing chaos in the process! // The Twins ask the Marsupilamis to wait for an important parcel, but they miss it, so try and retrieve it from the depot.

programme.title: E311 - Ray Forgives
programme.desc: Ray breaks up with Credenza, giving Danger Force only 48 hours to teach Ray how to forgive before his relationship is over forever. If Ray wants a future with Credenza, he must confront his past and learn to forgive his greatest enemy, Drex.

programme.title: Trivia Quizzes--You'll Get Scolded By Chiko-Chan!
programme.desc: Let's learn trivia of things we do unconsciously in our daily lives with 'Chiko-chan,' a five-year-old virtual girl who asks adults simple questions one after another!

programme.title: Unsolved Cases (Final)
programme.desc: NHK Special's iconic series 'Unsolved Cases' becomes a standalone program! Through in-depth investigations, the series explores a wide range of cases-from historic incidents that shook society to mysterious local crimes that cast long shadows over communities, both in Japan and abroad. Each episode reveals the enduring impact of these cases on contemporary society and uncovers valuable lessons for the future.

programme.title: Project X: The Challengers-New Beginnings The High-Speed Train That Revived The UK
programme.desc: Project X returns for the first time in 18 years. The former series featured people involved in project related to the Japanese industry and contemporary history. The new series focuses on people in the “Lost Era” following the collapse of the bubble economy. In every era, there are always those take on challenges. Even without receiving praise or being in the spotlight, some dedicate themselves to their work. The documentary delivers passion and courage right to you.

programme.title: E7 - The Treehouse Badge
programme.desc: Duggee is cleaning the clubhouse so the squirrels take refuge in the treehouse, but it's getting a little bit cramped these days. Norrie has an idea - maybe they need to add an extension.

programme.title: E6 - The Fossil Badge
programme.desc: The squirrels are digging in the garden when they come across a fossil, so Duggee and Narrator explain all about fossils and prehistoric times.

programme.title: E16 - Gua Rusa, Borneo
programme.desc: When Grandmaster Glitch discovers his Halloween pumpkin isn't as big as the Grimbots' one, he goes in search of some fertilizer to help it grow.

programme.title: E2 - Umbrella Bubbles
programme.desc: After getting muddy, Umbrella has to face his fear of getting wet and take his first bath.

programme.title: E3 - I'm An Actual Ninja You Know
programme.desc: From astronauts to acrobats, the animals talk about all the things they want to be when they grow up.

programme.title: E28 - Stories
programme.desc: Indy thinks she's no good because her model horse looks like a cow, but Calypso encourages her not to give up, so she tries to fix it with a little help from Winton.

programme.title: E34 - The Sleeping Badge
programme.desc: Tag is having trouble sleeping, so Duggee offers him a few tricks to help him.

programme.title: E22 - Parsley
programme.desc: Live from the Roots and Fruits Theatre, Parsley sings a rock song.

programme.title: E75 - Greens
programme.desc: Tinky Winky, Laa-Laa and Po pick delicious green beans. The Noo---noo puts the beans into the Tubby Custard Machine and out comes tasty, green Tubby Custard!

programme.title: E9 - Digger
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say 'digger' and we go on a whirlwind word adventure! We see lots of diggers - a big digger, a small digger, a dumping digger and a really muddy digger!

programme.title: E15 - Pig Gets Big
programme.desc: Farmer Jackson was just trying to grow some giant tomatoes, but he wound up with a giant pig! Now, Mojo and Bo have to get Felix back to normal size before Swoppiton gets stomped.

programme.title: E20 - The Midnight Badge
programme.desc: Loveable Duggee and the Squirrels return with more educational fun.

programme.title: E19 - The Laughter Badge
programme.desc: From sensible chuckles and nervous giggles to Duggee's infectious laughter, once everyone starts, it's so hard to stop. What were they laughing about again? Anyone remember?

programme.title: E5 - I'm Hungry
programme.desc: King Tiger and the Jelly wonder what Duggee has planned for today. Tag wants a snack, Enid has a musical cheese chase, and Norrie has a haircut.

programme.title: E45 - TV Shop
programme.desc: At the chemist, Bluey and Bingo have fun playing with the CCTV screens.

programme.title: E7 - The Treehouse Badge
programme.desc: Duggee is cleaning the clubhouse so the squirrels take refuge in the treehouse, but it's getting a little bit cramped these days. Norrie has an idea - maybe they need to add an extension.

programme.title: E6 - The Fossil Badge
programme.desc: The squirrels are digging in the garden when they come across a fossil, so Duggee and Narrator explain all about fossils and prehistoric times.

programme.title: E5 - The Footprint Badge
programme.desc: The squirrels are playing hide-and-seek, but they can't find Happy. The squirrels follow lots of different footprints that take them to their friend but there is one set they can't work out.

programme.title: E3 - The Transport Badge
programme.desc: When Duggee's old friend Rhodri goes home after a visit, he forgets his favourite hat. The Squirrels take an epic journey to give it back.

programme.title: E9 - Ladybird's Gameshow
programme.desc: Spot the odd one out or guess who lives here. A great memory tip from Duggee, an edition of The Agony and Eggstacy, and how to draw Enid - down to her last whisker.

programme.title: E11 - Stick Time
programme.desc: How many siblings does Norrie have? What's Duggee's favourite badge? What does everyone do on Fridays? Squirrel Club has the answers!

programme.title: E87 - Lullaby
programme.desc: During Tiddlytubbies' Sleepybyes, RuRu is wide awake. Tinky Winky, Dipsy, Laa-Laa and Po take it in turns to sing him a lullaby.

programme.title: E19 - The Claw
programme.desc: When Bluey and Bingo are unable to grab a prize on a Magic Claw machine, Mum and Dad create their own version at home. But Dad isn't about to make winning easy.

programme.title: E5 - Operation Jewel
programme.desc: Evil Pea steals Tomato's precious jewel. Supertato ventures to get it back by secretly lifting the jewel from Evil Pea's crown and defeating a crowd of rampaging Mini Peas.

programme.title: E9 - Ladybird's Gameshow
programme.desc: Spot the odd one out or guess who lives here. A great memory tip from Duggee, an edition of The Agony and Eggstacy, and how to draw Enid - down to her last whisker.

programme.desc: Lily is looking after a big toy baby, but she needs Krash and He-He to babysit her a while

programme.title: E25 - The Legend Of Kio
programme.desc: Yann and his little sister Marina live with their uncle Patrick, a famous oceanographer, on a Polynesian atoll. The two children meet Oum, a mysterious white dolphin who's always keen to help those he likes. Their friendship sees them exploring the ocean depths together.

programme.title: E5 - For The Prosecution
programme.desc: At the appeal court, assisted by Maxime, Jeanne defends a doctor accused of murder. On the opposite side, a heavyweight from the police force and against whom she holds an enduring grudge. Elodie is assaulted in the street. The prime suspect is none other than one of Nadia's clients.

programme.title: E10 - Nairobi (Kenya)
programme.desc: In Nairobi, Sarahmee learns to box with Sarah, a champion who founded Boxgirls Kenya to make girls stronger. She distributes sanitary products to women in need with the Her Light group and creates a scarf with the refugees of RefuSHE.

programme.title: 64' Actu:2025-2026
programme.desc: TV5MONDE's major daily news programme, decrypting the news! What you need to know: the Francophone view of the day's main events. Economics, social debates, international news: the expertise of our journalists. New weekend features: the French-speaking world, social networks, fake news, politics, sport...

programme.title: 64' Actu:2025-2026
programme.desc: TV5MONDE's major daily news programme, decrypting the news! What you need to know: the Francophone view of the day's main events. Economics, social debates, international news: the expertise of our journalists. New weekend features: the French-speaking world, social networks, fake news, politics, sport...

programme.title: E2 - The Difference
programme.desc: Dounia and her grandparents are gradually getting to know Canada, their new country. But for little Dounia, it isn't easy to get used to its seasons, food and language. She misses her father terribly. Fortunately her new friends rally round to help her make progress.

programme.title: E11 - Puppet Promotion
programme.desc: Twelve year-old Chloe is feeling somewhat disillusioned. Then Potobot, a little robot arrives from the future with a mission for her: to change the world and make the future a better place. There's no doubt about it, working together, one step after another, the two of them can move mountains!

programme.title: E21 - Toco Toucan
programme.desc: Dimitri, Raph's and Anais's uncle, is a French globetrotter who is fascinated by nature. He gives them tasks to stimulate their creativity. Thanks to Blox, a small robot, they access the ''world of the worlds'', a secret fantasy place where they can play and learn.

programme.title: E7 - Rivalry
programme.desc: The entire empire is on alert: Soundiata Keita's mother has been kidnapped. Abdul, as thirsty for power as ever, heads to the city of the sacred baobab trees.

programme.title: E6 - Lea Griton - Searching For Other Worlds
programme.desc: Associate professor and astrophysicist, Lea Griton has been working, since her thesis, on preparing a mission to explore the planet Uranus.

programme.title: E81 - Valentin Vacherot, Benjamin Balleret
programme.desc: He's the player of the moment, surprise winner of the ATP Masters 1000 in Shanghai, Monegasque tennis player Valentin Vacherot and his coach Benjamin Balleret join Pierre Classen.

programme.title: E2 - Hugo Servanin/Lou De Pray
programme.desc: We head off to the Fine Arts Museum in Libourne. Deep dive into sculptor Hugo Servanin's library of bodies and engineering laboratory. Danish designer Cecilie Bahnsen: combining Scandinavian pragmatism with French know-how. Discovery: digital light embroidery by Lou de Pray.

programme.title: Questions Pour Un Champion:2025-2026
programme.desc: A general knowledge quiz.

programme.title: Indonesia Down Under
programme.desc: Travel across Australia and discover the culture, food and special historical ties that Indonesia and Australia share. Delve into the connections as we highlight the rich Indonesian influences found in Australian communities.

programme.title: E5 - Vanishing Greece
programme.desc: Greece is one of the world's most popular tourist destinations, but the actual population of Greece is in freefall. There are far more deaths than births, young people have left in droves and migration is deeply unpopular.

programme.title: E24
programme.desc: 失意的女拳手劉鹽隻身踏上異國尋母之路，憑藉著拼命想要「贏一次」的野蠻生命力，在男主角盧天馳的支持與守護下，在拳擊與美食這兩個領域都闖出自己的天地，完成了人生的逆襲。

programme.title: E37
programme.desc: 消防局長宋焰（楊洋飾）和急診科醫生許沁（王楚然飾）分別十年之後重逢，青春時代的兩人因家庭反對被迫分開，再相見時，兩人都有了許多成長和改變。由於工作性質的原因，宋焰和許沁漸漸有了交集。宋焰帶領十里台的消防員們為維護人民生命財產安全而英勇奮鬥，經歷了無數次血與火的生死考驗後仍不改初心。他的堅持感染著許沁，困擾他們多年的心結也漸漸被解開。兩人克服家庭阻力，最後重新走到一起，互相鼓勵，共同進步，用各自的專長守護著這座美麗的城市。

programme.title: E38
programme.desc: 消防局長宋焰（楊洋飾）和急診科醫生許沁（王楚然飾）分別十年之後重逢，青春時代的兩人因家庭反對被迫分開，再相見時，兩人都有了許多成長和改變。由於工作性質的原因，宋焰和許沁漸漸有了交集。宋焰帶領十里台的消防員們為維護人民生命財產安全而英勇奮鬥，經歷了無數次血與火的生死考驗後仍不改初心。他的堅持感染著許沁，困擾他們多年的心結也漸漸被解開。兩人克服家庭阻力，最後重新走到一起，互相鼓勵，共同進步，用各自的專長守護著這座美麗的城市。

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: 先天二年夏秋之交，天子雖已登基，但大長公主勢力更盛，長安局勢陰晴難定。盧凌風和蘇無名，奉命帶著由裴喜君、費雞師、櫻桃和薛環組成的探案小隊，以護送康國所獻金桃的名義重返長安。

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: 侯文詠原著小說改編，兩段糾結的情感，交織出一場關於「選擇」的情愛旅程。

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: 先天二年夏秋之交，天子雖已登基，但大長公主勢力更盛，長安局勢陰晴難定。盧凌風和蘇無名，奉命帶著由裴喜君、費雞師、櫻桃和薛環組成的探案小隊，以護送康國所獻金桃的名義重返長安。

programme.title: E23
programme.desc: 本劇以患病少女何冉在生命最後階段學習生活、情感經歷與個人成長為線，講述她在遇到有著難以釋懷過往、幾乎對未來人生失去信心的傑出園藝家蕭寒後，兩人經過一系列誤打誤撞的、溫馨浪漫的奇妙際遇後，從彼此身上尋回各自生命中最重要卻曾經缺失的部分，重拾對生活的信心和希望，也收穫刻骨銘心愛情的故事。

programme.title: E34
programme.desc: 消防局長宋焰（楊洋飾）和急診科醫生許沁（王楚然飾）分別十年之後重逢，青春時代的兩人因家庭反對被迫分開，再相見時，兩人都有了許多成長和改變。由於工作性質的原因，宋焰和許沁漸漸有了交集。宋焰帶領十里台的消防員們為維護人民生命財產安全而英勇奮鬥，經歷了無數次血與火的生死考驗後仍不改初心。他的堅持感染著許沁，困擾他們多年的心結也漸漸被解開。兩人克服家庭阻力，最後重新走到一起，互相鼓勵，共同進步，用各自的專長守護著這座美麗的城市。

programme.desc: 先天二年夏秋之交，天子雖已登基，但大長公主勢力更盛，長安局勢陰晴難定。盧凌風和蘇無名，奉命帶著由裴喜君、費雞師、櫻桃和薛環組成的探案小隊，以護送康國所獻金桃的名義重返長安。

programme.desc: 消防局長宋焰（楊洋飾）和急診科醫生許沁（王楚然飾）分別十年之後重逢，青春時代的兩人因家庭反對被迫分開，再相見時，兩人都有了許多成長和改變。由於工作性質的原因，宋焰和許沁漸漸有了交集。宋焰帶領十里台的消防員們為維護人民生命財產安全而英勇奮鬥，經歷了無數次血與火的生死考驗後仍不改初心。他的堅持感染著許沁，困擾他們多年的心結也漸漸被解開。兩人克服家庭阻力，最後重新走到一起，互相鼓勵，共同進步，用各自的專長守護著這座美麗的城市。

programme.title: E3 - Roof Of The World
programme.desc: Back in 1955 Tim had arrived in Nepal by crossing the Middle East, but today Iran is hostile, Iraq fragile, and Syria still at war. Alex and Nat are forced on a detour through western China and Central Asia, a journey filled with dangers of its own.

programme.title: E11 - Milan, Part 2
programme.desc: Michael gets behind the wheel of a vintage racing car, makes a mystical discovery at the magnificent Castello Sforzesco, stirs up an aperitivo and throws his hand at one of Milan's favourite sports.

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: Song Ji-hyo continues on the greatest challenge of her life: free diving with the legendary Haenyeo female underwater sea fishers. The extraordinary lives of Jeju Island's female free divers are brought to the surface.

programme.desc: Ryan journeys deep into Peru along an ancient and remote footpath, where massive snow-capped mountains collide with lush tropical rain forests. programme.desc: Tony Angelo and Lucky Costa are reunited with the Crown Hick, a '66 F-100 sitting on a 2007 Crown Victoria frame, with suspension upgrades and a supercharger.

programme.title: E2 - The Need For Speed
programme.desc: Kevin and the Boyz take their first educational field trip to the Irwindale Drag Strip, where they learn about power and engine boost from some experienced locals.

programme.desc: Nick appraises a 1948 Bentley possibly linked to a Hollywood legend. Addison takes a hard look at a 'Gone In 60 Seconds' tribute Mustang.

programme.title: E1 - Deion Sanders
programme.desc: Deion Sanders takes his first camping trip in the wild - World-renowned survivalist Bear Grylls takes NFL Hall of Famer Deion Sanders to the mesas and canyons of Utah for his first-ever camping trip. Even though Sanders is a fish out of water, he takes a huge leap of faith and accepts Bear's challenges.

programme.title: E3 - Volcanoes
programme.desc: Volcanoes - how successful is mankind in the fight against this elemental force of nature?

programme.title: E5 - Waste
programme.desc: Searching for ways to minimize their carbon footprint, Zac and Darin visit a self-sustaining home and other businesses innovating to reduce waste.

programme.title: E7
programme.desc: Jess pitches in where Cylon Rolling Acres as owner Leslie Svacina runs her direct-to-consumer goat meat business.

programme.title: E8
programme.desc: Jess visits the East Foundation in South Texas to participate in a fast-paced, yet careful and methodical deer capture.

programme.title: E8 - D-Day
programme.desc: The Buffalo boys gather in Red Deer for Mikey’s D-Day tribute jump. Joe and Sam scout out the designated military drop zone over Abraham Lake in the Rockies only to discover the canyon is too narrow for the DC-3. So Joe cancels the whole thing—it’s too dangerous. Mikey uses Joe’s own philosophy against him: at Buffalo, there’s always a backup plan. Joe flies out to scout a new location for the drop on the lake but hits bad weather. As Joe is about to scrap the trip, twenty paratroopers from the Canadian and American armies arrive for the big jump and are ready to go. They board WZS and Joe takes off to a site he hasn’t scouted, in weather that just keeps getting worse. As they near the drop point, he finally calls it—no jump tonight. They turn back, with all the troops still on board. Mikey’s only hope is a narrow window first thing the next morning—but only if Joe gives the final okay.

programme.title: The Gothic Mystery - When Cathedrals Reached Up To The Heavens
programme.desc: Gothic architecture emerged in France in the 12th century. This architectural style revolutionized church construction, creating cathedrals that soared skywards. But where did the knowledge and technology for building these monuments come from?

programme.title: Serving The Pope With Your Life - What It's Like To Be A Swiss Guard
programme.desc: Dario is 25, Swiss, and has just sworn to protect the Pope - even if it costs him his life. In this rare behind-the-scenes look, we follow him through Vatican City, past tourists and tradition, and into the inner workings of one of the world's oldest military units.

programme.title: E16 - 心動告白
programme.desc: 以山野為背景，10位素人嘉賓都攜帶一個秘密進入「真相小屋」，這些秘密可能涉及過去的傷痛、未了的心願等，隨著節目推進逐漸揭曉；秘密成為推動他們情感發展的關鍵因素，也增加了未知性和驚喜感，並放棄了傳統戀綜依賴觀察室嘉賓或專家解析的模式，讓觀眾直接充當觀察者。

programme.title: E10 - 十強集結完成
programme.desc: 由周杰倫擔當音樂造夢者，召集夢想生活官劉畊宏和夢想見證官王鶴棣，及四組廠牌經理人GAI周延&布瑞吉Bridge、歐陽靖&小鬼王琳凱、艾熱&早安、VaVa&盛宇，一同為說唱新生代們的追夢之旅保駕護航；打破傳統導師帶隊模式，通過構建真實師徒關系，共同打造獨具特色的說唱廠牌；透過競演激發說唱歌手創作才華，在全民中尋找下一個說唱巨星。

programme.title: E4 - 黃曉明再現何以琛
programme.desc: 重磅打造的全明星爆笑旅行遊戲真人秀，由黃曉明、黃子韜、劉耀文、邵子恆、王鶴棣、于洋組成「宇宙爆閃團」，用高能抽象任務，打造解壓式快樂體驗，去有趣的地方做有意義的事；放下偶像包袱，發送獨一無二的快樂訊號。

programme.title: E14 - 沈騰安宇對唱全是技巧
programme.desc: 出發團老成員沈騰、白敬亭、金晨、賈冰、胡先煦、王安宇、范丞丞攜手再次奔赴自然秘境，沉浸式領略各地的美麗風景；以「金木水火土」為主題線索，踏上野外探險之旅，將旅行與挑戰深度綁定，足跡從西藏林芝、齊齊哈爾等國內秘境延伸至海外極端環境。

programme.title: E16 - 心動告白
programme.desc: 以山野為背景，10位素人嘉賓都攜帶一個秘密進入「真相小屋」，這些秘密可能涉及過去的傷痛、未了的心願等，隨著節目推進逐漸揭曉；秘密成為推動他們情感發展的關鍵因素，也增加了未知性和驚喜感，並放棄了傳統戀綜依賴觀察室嘉賓或專家解析的模式，讓觀眾直接充當觀察者。

programme.title: E10 - 十強集結完成

programme.title: E26
programme.desc: 在華麗成功的三位朋友面前，出現一位 10 年前因她們的謊言而成為殺人犯的老朋友，她為揭開三人隱藏在假面之下的真面目而決定背水一戰。而四位老朋友也因一位男人面臨人生漩渦，彼此展開關乎嫉妒和慾望戰爭的故事。

programme.title: E12
programme.desc: 劇情講述一個少女的失蹤交織著無數的謊言和慾望，牽涉其中的七個人遭遇重大事件後發生的故事。這七個人都會為了個人私慾背叛，出賣他人，過著充滿謊言的生活。​

programme.title: E49
programme.desc: 此劇敘述年幼便出道養家的一線女演員與PD的愛情故事。女演員因母親賭博的債務及醜聞一夜之間跌落谷底。PD嘗試鼓勵她重新振作，女演員卻消失了……

programme.title: E13
programme.desc: 劇情講述一個少女的失蹤交織著無數的謊言和慾望，牽涉其中的七個人遭遇重大事件後發生的故事。這七個人都會為了個人私慾背叛，出賣他人，過著充滿謊言的生活。​

programme.title: E4
programme.desc: 故事背景設定在不久的將來，在這個世界中，人們過去的性關係通過一條發光的紅色「S線」在他們頭頂上方以視覺方式連接。一位刑警、一位神秘的老師，以及一個天生能看到這些線的少女，共同應對由這一現象引發的系列令人不安的事件。

programme.title: E10 - With Martin Charlier
programme.desc: On the menu: onion and goat cheese-stuffed date salad plus beef carbonnade with gueuze beer and chicory.

programme.title: E4 - Lalique Crystal/Acapulco Paradiso Paris
programme.desc: Parisian walk around the Place des Vosges. Lalique revives the innovative spirit of Rene Lalique through a collection that enhances light and nature. Learn all about the origins of the marquise ring. The brand Acapulco Paradiso Paris, by Zoe du Puy-Montbrun, creates original outfits for dancers.

programme.title: E1 - Martelange
programme.desc: To kick off the 2025 season, Adrien Joveneau highlights the town of Martelange, located on the Luxembourg border, known for its slate mining past and its wooded landscapes. The musical guest for this stop is the band Suarez, accompanied by Antoine Donneaux.

programme.title: E3 - Unusual Museums
programme.desc: Among the two hundred museums in the city of Paris, some are more confidential than others and belong to brands, associations, or private collectors. Yvan Hallouin explores the most surprising of them.

programme.title: E7 - Terroirs Of Excellence In Franche-Comte, From The Jura Mountains To The Mon
programme.desc: From watchmakers to cooks to jewellers to guides: these enthusiasts protect and celebrate their region from the plateaus of the Jura mountains to the Montbeliard region. Turned towards nature and protection of natural resources, they also seek to promote the know-how of skilled tradesmen passed on from generation to generation.

programme.desc: Fashion, design, gastronomy, lifestyle... Discover the world of French chic!

programme.desc: This drama features the women of three generations and people around them. Mari grows up as a good teacher of this generation where there is no true mentor. programme.title: My First Of May
programme.desc: My First of May follows TANG Suk Yin and his daughter TANG Chi, whose lives are turned upside down when Chi is diagnosed with a serious illness, given little chance to survive past two. Faced with this heart-wrenching reality, Suk Yin and his wife, Elaine YEUNG, promise to cherish every moment with Chi. Miraculously, Chi survives beyond two, but this brings significant changes. The couple sacrifices their dreams to care for her-Suk Yin gives up his squash career, while Elaine, overwhelmed by pressure, abandons the family. In despair, Suk Yin withdraws and becomes a recluse. Without parental support, Chi relies on her grandmother, SUEN Yau Mui. When her grandmother's health deteriorates, Suk Yin can no longer ignore his responsibilities and returns home. After years apart, how will they mend their strained relationships? Unexpectedly, a small understanding from the past helps them reconnect. With Suk Yin's support, Chi gains movement in her ring finger, rekindling love in the

programme.title: Baogu At the Movie E262 -Night King

programme.title: The Last Supper
programme.desc: The early history of a nation unfolds through the actions of three heroes – Liu Bang, Xiang Yu and Han Xin – who chased their dreams of uniting a warring nation and fought through major milestones of the Chu-Han Contention years in the third century. From the Julu War to the Hongmen Banquet, the Gaixia War to the death of HanXin, the narration of Liu Bang – who would be the founding emperor of the new Han Dynasty – sets the stage for a tale of betrayal and brothers at war, where the last man standing inherits a nation.

programme.desc: Unlocked is a home tour series focused on how much people across the globe spend on their housing, what they get for the money and what they had to sacrifice to make it happen.
